verdict: Buy XEQT.TO at $44.48 CAD. Core is 10.5% vs 40% target — $1,873 to go. Fund first, every deposit.
Cap breaches: CEG, OSS. Do not add — shrink by dilution.
Theme concentration at 89.4%. Building XEQT core is the fix.
Skip: MSFT above zone; PLTR above no-chase.

warnings: UNDER-DIVERSIFIED: XEQT core is 10.5% vs 40% target (29.5pp below). Prioritize funding core.
THEME CONCENTRATION: Single-theme (AI/power/nuclear) exposure at 89.4% — above 50% threshold.
SOFI: only $2.86 CAD room to cap — too small for a meaningful buy.
